message:
fix(tests): update test mocks for taint-aware filtering, mission sidebar, and DashboardPage changes (#9437)

- GPUReservations: use vi.fn() for useGPUNodes mock, wrap tab clicks in act(),
  use getAllByText for elements appearing multiple times, fix usage bar assertion
- MissionBrowser: add missing getKubaraConfig export to browser mock
- Nodes: fix createMergedStatValueGetter mock to delegate to primary getter
- DashboardPage: update selector from pt-16 to pt-4 after header spacing change

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -88,6 +88,7 @@ vi.mock('../browser', () => ({ MissionFetchErrorBanner: ({ message }: { message: string }) =>
{message}
, getMissionSlug: (m: { title?: string }) => (m.title || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-'), getMissionShareUrl: () => 'https://example.com/missions/test', + getKubaraConfig: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ baseUrl: '', repo: '', branch: '' }), updateNodeInTree: vi.fn((nodes: unknown[]) => nodes), removeNodeFromTree: vi.fn((nodes: unknown[]) => nodes), missionCache: {
